alzio.detect 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to alzio.detect

    Score the ADAS-Cog13

    score_adas_cog13.Rd

    Calculates the total ADAS-Cog13 score from item-level data. Accepts a named data frame/matrix (column names matched) or a numeric vector of exactly 13 items in standard order.

    score_adas_cog13(items)

    Arguments

    items

    A data frame, matrix, or numeric vector. If named, the function attempts to match columns to item names. If unnamed with length 13, items are taken in the order above.

    Value

    The total ADAS-Cog13 score (range 0–85).

    Details

    Standard ADAS-Cog13 item order:

    1. Word recall (0–10)

    2. Naming (0–5)

    3. Commands (0–5)

    4. Constructional praxis (0–5)

    5. Ideational praxis (0–5)

    6. Orientation (0–8)

    7. Word recognition (0–12)

    8. Remembering instructions (0–5)

    9. Spoken language (0–5)

    10. Word finding (0–5)

    11. Comprehension (0–5)

    12. Delayed word recall (0–10)

    13. Maze errors (0–5)

    Contents

    Developed by Dany Mukesha.
